mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM rule_definition
IFNULL(deleted_flag, 0) = 0
AND status = #{status}
AND ( rule_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM rule_param p WHERE p.rule_id = rule_definition.id AND (p.param_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.param_label LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ) )
SELECT id, rule_name, description, category_code, script, status, deleted_flag, crte_time, updt_time FROM rule_definition WHERE id = #{id} AND IFNULL(deleted_flag, 0) = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT id, rule_name, description, category_code, script, status, deleted_flag, crte_time, updt_time FROM rule_definition WHERE id IN #{id} AND IFNULL(deleted_flag, 0) = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rule_definition (rule_name, description, category_code, script, status, deleted_flag, crte_time, updt_time) VALUES (#{ruleName}, #{description}, #{categoryCode}, #{script}, #{status}, #{deletedFlag}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE rule_definition SET rule_name = #{ruleName}, description = #{description}, category_code = #{categoryCode}, script = #{script}, status = #{status}, updt_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND IFNULL(deleted_flag, 0) = 0
UPDATE rule_definition SET status = #{status}, updt_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND IFNULL(deleted_flag, 0) = 0
UPDATE rule_definition SET deleted_flag = 1, updt_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND IFNULL(deleted_flag, 0) = 0
mapper.select: SELECT id, rule_id, param_name, param_label, param_type, required, sort_no, crte_time, updt_time FROM rule_param WHERE rule_id IN #{ruleId} ORDER BY rule_id ASC, sort_no ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rule_param (rule_id, param_name, param_label, param_type, required, sort_no, crte_time, updt_time) VALUES (#{ruleId}, #{paramName}, #{paramLabel}, #{paramType}, #{required}, #{sortNo}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, param_id, option_value, option_label, sort_no, crte_time, updt_time FROM rule_param_option WHERE param_id IN #{paramId} ORDER BY param_id ASC, sort_no ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rule_param_option (param_id, option_value, option_label, sort_no, crte_time, updt_time) VALUES (#{paramId}, #{optionValue}, #{optionLabel}, #{sortNo}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, category_code, category_name, sort_no, enabled, crte_time, updt_time FROM rule_category WHERE IFNULL(enabled, 1) = 1 ORDER BY sort_no ASC, id ASC
SELECT id, set_name, sort_no, enabled, crte_time, updt_time FROM rule_preset_option_set WHERE IFNULL(enabled, 1) = 1 ORDER BY sort_no ASC, id ASC
SELECT id, set_id, option_value, option_label, sort_no FROM rule_preset_option_item WHERE set_id IN #{setId} ORDER BY set_id ASC, sort_no ASC, id ASC
